title: Business Rule frontmatter schema
description: Schema for BR artifacts — atomic, verifiable statements about how the business or regulated domain operates, independent of any system. BRs encode regulatory logic, contractual conditions, and domain policies that FR/NFR must implement. Reverse links (implemented_by) are computed by the traceability script.

status.description: draft: captured from source; proposed: reviewed for correctness; approved: accepted as authoritative; deprecated: superseded or no longer applicable

classification.description: Origin category: regulatory (law/regulation), contractual (contract clause), policy (internal policy), domain-logic (business domain fact)

derives_from.description: Wiki links to parent BRQ artifacts this rule is derived from

framework.description: Name of the regulatory framework (e.g., EU-2023-1542, GDPR, PCI-DSS)

regulatory_ref.description: Structured reference to specific regulatory article. Only for classification: regulatory.
